title: KISS truncated escape (FESC FEND) swallowed as valid frame
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/transport/kiss_transport.c:90-94. spec/kiss-framing.md §1.3 defines exactly two valid escape sequences; FESC immediately followed by FEND is a malformed truncated-escape frame. Code checks FEND first, so FEND 0x00 0x41 FESC FEND completes and dispatches a frame containing 0x41, silently swallowing the dangling FESC. Rust returns TruncatedEscape and drops; Python raises KissError. Fix: when FEND arrives with escape_next set, abort/reset the frame as malformed.
